description.description: Optional description providing context for the resource

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the resource (cannot be null)

management_group_id.description: Specifies the management group this resource belongs to

metadata.description: Optional metadata for additional resource context

mode.description: Defines the policy mode; must be compliant with supported types

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the resource (cannot be null)

policy_rule.description: Defines the JSON policy rule configuration

policy_type.description: Specifies the policy type (e.g., BuiltIn, Custom, or NotSpecified)

timeouts.description: Custom timeout settings for resource operations
